commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a caller-provided inbound history limit to prompt metadata serialization, threads Discord's resolved historyLimit into the reply context, and adds a unit test for a 25-entry history window.

PR surface: Source +21, Tests +24. Total +45 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows Discord can collect more than 20 history entries using the resolved historyLimit, while current main and v2026.6.6 prompt serialization still slice InboundHistory to 20; I did not run a live Discord repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] This needs maintainer proof or proof-override handling, not a safe automated code repair from this read-only review.

target.title: Respect configured inbound history cap
target.body:
## Summary
- make inbound prompt history serialization use a caller-provided cap instead of the fixed 20-entry cap
- pass the resolved group history limit from reply preparation, falling back to messages.groupChat.historyLimit
- preserve Discord channel/account historyLimit through InboundHistoryLimit so prompt metadata matches the collected history window

## Tests
- pnpm test src/auto-reply/reply/inbound-meta.test.ts
- pnpm test extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.context.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/inbound-meta.test.ts (Discord shard had no matching file; inbound-meta shard passed)
- pnpm format:check src/auto-reply/reply/inbound-meta.ts src/auto-reply/templating.ts src/auto-reply/reply/get-reply-run.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.context.ts src/auto-reply/reply/inbound-meta.test.ts
- pnpm exec tsc --noEmit --pretty false (failed: Node heap OOM at default heap)
- NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 pnpm exec tsc --noEmit --pretty false (failed on existing PI test cast errors in src/agents/pi-embedded-runner*.test.ts; unrelated to this change)
